title: Demimortality
description: Limited Lives with Resurrections and Life Transfusions!
body:
![Demimortality Logo](https://www.dropbox.com/s/s2li7hdg4384j0z/title.png?dl=1) #### Have you ever played a Hardcore SMP and wished you could bring someone back from the dead? Inspired by Third Life and Last Life, with Demimortality every player gets three lives. However, lives can be transferred between players and even used to resurrect the dead!
For more information, please see the [Wiki](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/demimortality/pages/home)!
